Home / Services / Garage Door Installation

Garage Door Installation

Professional installation of energy-efficient garage doors built for Nevada's climate.

New construction in Summerlin or replacing an outdated door in Henderson? We install high-performance garage doors that stand up to desert conditions while enhancing your home's curb appeal. Our selection includes insulated steel doors that help regulate garage temperatures (critical when it's 115°F outside) and durable aluminum options resistant to UV fading.

For historic homes near Fremont Street, we offer custom wood-look doors that maintain neighborhood charm while providing modern durability. In master-planned communities, we coordinate with HOA requirements for style and color matching.

Every installation includes professional disposal of your old door, precision alignment to prevent future issues, and a tutorial on maintaining your investment. We handle all permitting requirements for North Las Vegas's newer developments where inspections are mandatory.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Free consultation to discuss insulation needs, style preferences, and budget
  2. 02 Step 2: Precise measurements accounting for our region's soil movement
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional removal and disposal of old door
  4. 04 Step 4: Installation with reinforced framing for wind resistance

Benefits

  • Energy-efficient options reduce garage heat buildup
  • Professional measurement prevents future alignment issues
  • Styles to match any Las Vegas architecture
  • Full cleanup including old door removal

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a new garage door last in Las Vegas?

With proper maintenance, our installed doors average 15-20 years even in harsh conditions. We use thicker gauge steel and premium finishes specifically for desert climates.

Do you work with HOAs in Summerlin?

Yes, we're familiar with all major community guidelines and can provide pre-approval documentation for your architectural review committee.

Will a new garage door improve my home's energy efficiency?

Absolutely. Our insulated doors can reduce garage temperatures by 20-30°F, which matters when your garage shares walls with living spaces in single-story Las Vegas homes.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with garage door installation? Contact us today.
